execution_steps: Run 'loom start <task_id>' to lock active context
Check git status to ensure workspace awareness
specific details based on context: e.g., Create/Update Test File for feature X (Red Phase)
specific details based on context: e.g., Implement Code for feature X in src/ (Green Phase) - MUST add @trace <task_id>
Review implementation against Definition of Done (DoD) from the task context. Do not complete unless all criteria are met.
Execute the command defined in tdd_cycle.verification_command and ensure the output indicates a passing state BEFORE calling loom_complete.
Make a git commit with the implemented changes
definition_of_done: [[REPLACE_WITH_SPECIFIC_CRITERIA]]: e.g., Feature X works correctly as defined in FR-Y
All modified source files have @trace annotation
loom validate passes (Checks Traces/Metadata only, DOES NOT run code tests)
